cases.name: meeting with clear decisions and owners

input.transcript: Anjali: Okay, I think we've kicked this around enough. Marcus, can you take ownership of moving the export pipeline to Postgres? Marcus: Yeah, I can have a draft architecture doc by Friday. Anjali: Great, that's decided then — we're moving off Mongo for the export pipeline. Anjali: One open thing — we still don't know whether the new compliance lead will own SOC2 prep or whether that stays with engineering. We'll table that for the next staff meeting. Anjali: Lastly — Marcus, please ship the ICS-export bug fix today, it's been open three weeks. Marcus: Will do, before EOD.

Tom: So I wanted to discuss whether we should move our analytics off Heap. Sarah: I have thoughts but maybe we should circle back. Tom: Yeah, let's revisit. Tom: Anyone have updates? *pause* Okay, see everyone next week.
